news.t: AVANTIS INVESTORS LAUNCHES THREE NEW ACTIVE ETFS

holdings.infoBox: AVEE is an equity ETF with a total of 2771 individual holdings. The top holdings are LG Innotek stock at 1.23%, Macronix International at 0.88%, Hyosung Heavy Industries at 0.67%, Kingboard Holdings at 0.57%, and Taiwan Union Technology at 0.51%.

overview.description: The Avantis Emerging Markets Small Cap Equity ETF (AVEE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation through an actively managed portfolio of small-cap companies in the emerging market equity space, selected based on fundamental criteria. AVEE was launched on Nov 7, 2023 and is issued by American Century Investments.

data.title: AVANTIS INVESTORS LAUNCHES THREE NEW ACTIVE ETFS
